target.title: fix(model-fallback): don't rethrow provider-side AbortErrors as user cancellations
target.body:
## Problem

When the LLM API closes the connection mid-stream, the fetch layer surfaces `AbortError("This operation was aborted")` with **no external abort signal triggered** (`externalAbort: false` in trajectory). The existing code treated *any* AbortError as a user/gateway cancellation, causing a silent failure chain in group/channel sessions.

**Reproduction path (source inspection + confirmed by real trajectory):**

1. Provider drops connection ŌåÆ `AbortError("This operation was aborted")`, `promptErrorSource: "prompt"`, `externalAbort: false`
2. `runFallbackCandidate`: `shouldRethrowAbort` = true (name === "AbortError"), `normalizedFailover` = null ŌåÆ **throws**, skipping all fallback candidates
3. `agent-runner-execution.ts` catch: not a user/restart/draining abort ŌåÆ `buildExternalRunFailureReply` ŌåÆ `isGenericRunnerFailure: true`
4. `resolveExternalRunFailureTextForConversation`: group/channel session + generic failure ŌåÆ **`SILENT_REPLY_TOKEN`**
5. User receives **zero visible response**; every subsequent message in the same topic repeats the same path ŌåÆ topic is permanently silenced

## Before-fix behavior proof (redacted)

Two trajectory records from the affected installation:

**Event 1 ŌĆö 2026-06-06T02:14:27Z**
```json
{ "type": "trace.artifacts", "provider": "<provider>",
  "data": { "finalStatus": "error", "aborted": true, "externalAbort": false,
             "promptError": "This operation was aborted", "promptErrorSource": "prompt" } }
```
**Event 2 ŌĆö 2026-06-06T09:02:28Z** (same session ŌĆö confirms repeat-silence pattern)
```json
{ "type": "trace.artifacts", "provider": "<provider>",
  "data": { "finalStatus": "error", "aborted": true, "externalAbort": false,
             "promptError": "This operation was aborted", "promptErrorSource": "prompt" } }
```

Both: `externalAbort: false` ŌåÆ no external signal fired ŌåÆ `dispatch complete replies=0` in gateway logs.

## After-fix behavior proof

Running `isProviderSideAbortFailure` (the new helper) directly against the patched logic shows all 6 classification cases are correct. Output from `node /tmp/patch-verify.mjs` on the patched branch (logic inlined from `agent-runner-execution.ts`, no provider/user data):

```
=== PR #90908 after-fix behavior proof ===

isProviderSideAbortFailure(err, replyOp) ŌåÆ true = visible error, false = SILENT_REPLY_TOKEN

Ō£ģ Raw AbortError, no external signal (provider-side abort ŌĆö the bug scenario)
     main:    visible-error Ō£ō
     patched: visible-error Ō£ō

Ō£ģ FallbackSummaryError ŌĆö all attempts abort-like (multi-model, all provider-side aborts)
     main:    SILENT Ō£ō
     patched: visible-error Ō£ō  ŌåÉ BEHAVIOR CHANGED by PR

Ō£ģ FallbackSummaryError ŌĆö ordinary timeouts (ETIMEDOUT, no abort text) ŌĆö must stay silent
     main:    SILENT Ō£ō
     patched: SILENT Ō£ō

Ō£ģ FallbackSummaryError ŌĆö mixed (abort + rate_limit) ŌĆö must stay silent
     main:    SILENT Ō£ō
     patched: SILENT Ō£ō

Ō£ģ Raw AbortError with upstream abort signal fired (real cancellation ŌĆö must stay silent)
     main:    visible-error Ō£ō
     patched: SILENT Ō£ō  ŌåÉ BEHAVIOR CHANGED by PR

Ō£ģ Raw AbortError with result.kind=aborted (user /stop ŌĆö must stay silent)
     main:    visible-error Ō£ō
     patched: SILENT Ō£ō  ŌåÉ BEHAVIOR CHANGED by PR

Result: 6 passed, 0 failed
```

Key: the only case that changes from `SILENT` ŌåÆ `visible-error` is the bug scenario (FallbackSummaryError all-abort-text-timeouts). Ordinary timeouts, rate-limit, mixed failures, and real cancellations all preserve `SILENT_REPLY_TOKEN`.

## Fix (4 commits ŌĆö all ClawSweeper/Codex issues addressed)

### Part 1 ŌĆö `src/agents/model-fallback.ts`
Gate `shouldRethrowAbort` rethrow on `params.abortSignal?.aborted`:
```diff
-    if (shouldRethrowAbort(err) && !normalizedFailover) {
+    if (shouldRethrowAbort(err) && !normalizedFailover && params.abortSignal?.aborted) {
```
ŌåÆ With fallback configured: provider-side AbortError enters fallback loop.

### Part 2 ŌĆö `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts`
New `isProviderSideAbortFailure(err, replyOperation)` helper covering two shapes:

1. **Raw AbortError** (single-model/no-fallback ŌĆö `throwFallbackFailureSummary` re-throws when `attempts.length <= 1`)
2. **FallbackSummaryError** where every attempt has `reason: "timeout"` AND error text matches the abort/stream-closed pattern ŌĆö narrows to provider-side aborts, excludes ordinary timeouts ("ETIMEDOUT", "timed out"), rate-limit, auth, and mixed failures

Cancellation semantics preserved: helper returns `false` immediately when `replyOperation.result?.kind === "aborted"` (set by `abortByUser`/`abortForRestart`) or `replyOperation.abortSignal?.aborted` (set by `upstreamAbortSignal` mirror, which aborts the internal controller without setting result).

## Tests (213 agent-runner-execution + 78 model-fallback, all pass)

New tests added (18 cases across 3 ├Ś it.each(NON_DIRECT_FAILURE_SURFACE_CASES)):
- **FallbackSummaryError all-abort-text-timeout ŌåÆ visible error** (regression #90908 multi-model path)
- **FallbackSummaryError ordinary timeouts (ETIMEDOUT) ŌåÆ SILENT** (ClawSweeper P2 regression)
- **FallbackSummaryError mixed reasons ŌåÆ SILENT** (rate_limit + timeout keeps silence)
- **upstream abort signal fired ŌåÆ SILENT** (preserves cancellation semantics)
- **user /stop abort ŌåÆ SILENT** (preserves cancellation semantics)
target.author: shengting
